x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/Cheat/dllmain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/Injector/injector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/kiero/kiero.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_dx11.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bananainjector.exe.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_win32.cpp.o -o bananainjector.exe  libMinHook.a -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -lws2_32 -lpsapi -lshlwapi -luser32 -lgdi32 -ld3d11 -ldxgi
